objections.description: At most ONE objection per axis: the single strongest reason the synthesis is wrong on that axis. Bounded at 3 total. Substantive, not a nitpick list. Skip an axis rather than pad it.

objection.description: The strongest reason the synthesis is wrong on this axis, and what it smoothed over.

mis_ranked_crux.description: A crux the synthesis mis-ranked, left unstated, or wrongly marked verified. Empty string if none on this axis.

strongest_objection_id.description: The id of the single most decision-relevant objection.
